ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., 2020 Presidential Election) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., Presidential, Local) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., Active, Completed, Upcoming) */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Specific cycle of the election */,
  "voter_registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "absentee_voting_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for absentee voting */,
  "results_announced_date" TEXT /* Date when the election results are announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the ward is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the ward */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the ward */,
  "active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., President, Governor) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., Executive, Legislative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Length of the term for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is contesting */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election cycle */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current or most recent occupation of the candidate */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Brief description of the candidate's platform or key policies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the votes were cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the ward */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election cycle */,
  "ward_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the ward */,
  "ward_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the ward */,
  "ward_active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "voter_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "voter_age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "voter_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter was registered */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the voter is registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "last_voted_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election in which the voter participated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election cycle */,
  "voters_registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the ward */,
  "voters_voted" INTEGER /* Number of voters who voted in the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "ward_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the ward */,
  "ward_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the ward */,
  "ward_active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Election Official, Data Analyst, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View Results) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
